verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi David.   Benedic, anima mea, Domino,  et omnia quæ intra me sunt nomini sancto ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ בָּרְכִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְכׇל־קְ֝רָבַ֗י אֶת־שֵׁ֥ם קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedic, anima mea, Domino,  et noli oblivisci omnes retributiones ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרְכִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאַל־תִּ֝שְׁכְּחִ֗י כׇּל־גְּמוּלָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui propitiatur omnibus iniquitatibus tuis ;  qui sanat omnes infirmitates tuas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַסֹּלֵ֥חַ לְכׇל־עֲוֺנֵ֑כִי הָ֝רֹפֵ֗א לְכׇל־תַּחֲלוּאָֽיְכִי׃
verses.king_james: Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui redimit de interitu vitam tuam ;  qui coronat te in misericordia et miserationibus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַגּוֹאֵ֣ל מִשַּׁ֣חַת חַיָּ֑יְכִי הַֽ֝מְעַטְּרֵ֗כִי חֶ֣סֶד וְרַחֲמִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Who redeemeth thy life from destruction; who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui replet in bonis desiderium tuum ;  renovabitur ut aquilæ juventus tua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמַּשְׂבִּ֣יעַ בַּטּ֣וֹב עֶדְיֵ֑ךְ תִּתְחַדֵּ֖שׁ כַּנֶּ֣שֶׁר נְעוּרָֽיְכִי׃
verses.king_james: Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle’s.

verses.latin_vulgate: faciens misericordias Dominus,  et judicium omnibus injuriam patientibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹשֵׂ֣ה צְדָק֣וֹת יְהֹוָ֑ה וּ֝מִשְׁפָּטִ֗ים לְכׇל־עֲשׁוּקִֽים׃
verses.king_james: The Lord executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Notas fecit vias suas Moysi ;  filiis Israël voluntates suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹדִ֣יעַ דְּרָכָ֣יו לְמֹשֶׁ֑ה לִבְנֵ֥י יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל עֲלִילוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserator et misericors Dominus :  longanimis, et multum misericors.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַח֣וּם וְחַנּ֣וּן יְהֹוָ֑ה אֶ֖רֶךְ אַפַּ֣יִם וְרַב־חָֽסֶד׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non in perpetuum irascetur,  neque in æternum comminabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־לָנֶ֥צַח יָרִ֑יב וְלֹ֖א לְעוֹלָ֣ם יִטּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non secundum peccata nostra fecit nobis,  neque secundum iniquitates nostras retribuit nobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֣א כַ֭חֲטָאֵינוּ עָ֣שָׂה לָ֑נוּ וְלֹ֥א כַ֝עֲוֺנֹתֵ֗ינוּ גָּמַ֥ל עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam secundum altitudinem cæli a terra,  corroboravit misericordiam suam super timentes se ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י כִגְבֹ֣הַּ שָׁ֭מַיִם עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ גָּבַ֥ר חַ֝סְדּ֗וֹ עַל־יְרֵאָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him.

verses.latin_vulgate: quantum distat ortus ab occidente,  longe fecit a nobis iniquitates nostras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּרְחֹ֣ק מִ֭זְרָח מִֽמַּעֲרָ֑ב הִֽרְחִ֥יק מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ אֶת־פְּשָׁעֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo miseretur pater filiorum,  misertus est Dominus timentibus se.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּרַחֵ֣ם אָ֭ב עַל־בָּנִ֑ים רִחַ֥ם יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה עַל־יְרֵאָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Like as a father pitieth his children, so the Lord pitieth them that fear him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ipse cognovit figmentum nostrum ;  recordatus est quoniam pulvis sumus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־ה֭וּא יָדַ֣ע יִצְרֵ֑נוּ זָ֝כ֗וּר כִּי־עָפָ֥ר אֲנָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.king_james: For he knoweth our frame; he remembereth that we are dust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Homo, sicut fœnum dies ejus ;  tamquam flos agri, sic efflorebit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֭נוֹשׁ כֶּחָצִ֣יר יָמָ֑יו כְּצִ֥יץ הַ֝שָּׂדֶ֗ה כֵּ֣ן יָצִֽיץ׃
verses.king_james: As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam spiritus pertransibit in illo, et non subsistet,  et non cognoscet amplius locum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ר֣וּחַ עָֽבְרָה־בּ֣וֹ וְאֵינֶ֑נּוּ וְלֹֽא־יַכִּירֶ֖נּוּ ע֣וֹד מְקוֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misericordia autem Domini ab æterno,  et usque in æternum super timentes eum.  Et justitia illius in filios filiorum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחֶ֤סֶד יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ מֵעוֹלָ֣ם וְעַד־ע֭וֹלָם עַל־יְרֵאָ֑יו וְ֝צִדְקָת֗וֹ לִבְנֵ֥י בָנִֽים׃
verses.king_james: But the mercy of the Lord is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him, and his righteousness unto children’s children;

verses.latin_vulgate: his qui servant testamentum ejus,  et memores sunt mandatorum ipsius ad faciendum ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְשֹׁמְרֵ֥י בְרִית֑וֹ וּלְזֹכְרֵ֥י פִ֝קֻּדָ֗יו לַעֲשׂוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus in cælo paravit sedem suam,  et regnum ipsius omnibus dominabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה בַּ֭שָּׁמַיִם הֵכִ֣ין כִּסְא֑וֹ וּ֝מַלְכוּת֗וֹ בַּכֹּ֥ל מָשָֽׁלָה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicite Domino, omnes angeli ejus :  potentes virtute, facientes verbum illius,  ad audiendam vocem sermonum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרְכ֥וּ יְהֹוָ֗ה מַלְאָ֫כָ֥יו גִּבֹּ֣רֵי כֹ֭חַ עֹשֵׂ֣י דְבָר֑וֹ לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗עַ בְּק֣וֹל דְּבָרֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, ye his angels, that excel in strength, that do his commandments, hearkening unto the voice of his word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicite Domino, omnes virtutes ejus ;  ministri ejus, qui facitis voluntatem ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרְכ֣וּ יְ֭הֹוָה כׇּל־צְבָאָ֑יו מְ֝שָׁרְתָ֗יו עֹשֵׂ֥י רְצוֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Bless ye the Lord, all ye his hosts; ye ministers of his, that do his pleasure.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicite Domino, omnia opera ejus :  in omni loco dominationis ejus,  benedic, anima mea, Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרְכ֤וּ יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ כׇּֽל־מַעֲשָׂ֗יו בְּכׇל־מְקֹמ֥וֹת מֶמְשַׁלְתּ֑וֹ בָּרְכִ֥י נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Bless the Lord, all his works in all places of his dominion: bless the Lord, O my soul.
